title: Operator tooling focus: Grafana and Bitwarden
goal: Evaluate Grafana and Bitwarden only where they strengthen Heim-PC operator observability and secret hygiene without becoming a second control-plane or weakening Grabowski/Bureau/Leitstand boundaries. n8n is intentionally removed from this initiative and must not be pursued unless a later explicit user decision reopens it.
completion: Grafana is either explicitly deferred behind the Beszel monitoring pilot or has a documented read-only observability role, a non-conflicting port/route plan and a clear Leitstand relationship.
Bitwarden CLI usage remains documented as a fail-closed secret reference path with no secret export into repos, logs, evidence packets or broad agent context.
n8n has no active Bureau task, no queue slot and no install path in this initiative.

metadata.source: User request on 2026-07-08: grafana, n8n, bitwarden ins visier nehmen
live_findings: grafana-server and n8n not present in PATH during live check
port 3000 is already listening on heim-pc; Grafana default port would conflict
Leitstand and rLens are already active; new tooling must not become a second operator truth
metadata.n8n_removed_reason: User explicitly requested deletion; current architecture favors deterministic Bureau/Grabowski/Leitstand paths over visual workflow automation.
